title: Hamster of Undying
description: Adds an animated Hamster Totem that replaces the Totem of Undying
body:
# _Hamster of Undying_

**An animated hamster totem to replace the Totem of Undying**

![An orange hamster with a white chest and pink nose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28a8b720fbdd8e5a086232a13dcf0f14f1507f49.gif)
